title: Comedy Chya Gudgulya
subTitle: Gifted comics and stand-up sketch artists perform hilarious skits, entertaining both the judges as well as the audience.

title: Zombivli
subTitle: The lives of a young middle-class couple and a slum leader collide when a mysterious virus causes a zombie outbreak in the suburbs of Mumbai.

title: Bandishala
subTitle: Madhavi Sawant, a tough police officer, incurs the wrath of several powerful enemies who plan to get rid of her. Despite the dangers, she continues to fight against corruption and criminals.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Patanjali Yog by Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
subTitle: Renowned Indian spiritual leader Swami Ramdev delivers demonstrations of various yoga poses and exercises for a healthy life.

title: Sur Niragas Ho
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of popular songs composed and performed by talented artists is played back-to-back to entertain the audience.

title: Gajar Kirtanacha Sohala Anandacha
subTitle: Devotees come forward to perform various kirtans and devotional songs while offering their prayers and worship to the Almighty.

title: Gajar Kirtanacha Sohala Anandacha

title: Dhum Dhadaka
subTitle: Mahesh seeks to wed his haughty employer's daughter, Gauri, but faces opposition from her father. He takes his friend Ashok's help to woo her father, but Ashok is in love with Gauri's sister.

title: Kutumb
subTitle: Namdeo and Ganga are a happily married couple with two children. When Ganga suffers from a severe back pain, the entire family teams up to ensure they make sufficient money for her treatment.

title: Vajau Ka?
subTitle: A man is gifted with the talent of music by Lord Krishna in order to support his dream of becoming a musician. However, things take a turn when he starts getting attracted to random women.

title: Mann Mandira
subTitle: 'Man Mandira - Gajar Bhakticha' is a Marathi devotional show, featuring keertan and worship during 'Ashadi Ekadashi.' Renowned Keertankars like Nivruti Maharaj offer a spiritual, festive experience.

title: Jai Malhar
subTitle: The reincarnation of Lord Shiva, Lord Khandoba, rules over the hearts of his devotees who revere him dearly. He soon becomes famous for his magnanimity, valour and power.

title: Yeu Ka Gharat
subTitle: A new postman arrives in Dambratwadi, sparking an unlikely romance with the village chief's daughter. Their budding love faces a challenge when a teacher joins the community.
